blockers: The native apply endpoint has no prepare token, stale-state fingerprint, idempotency key, typed confirmation, or durable outcome_unknown receipt.
Hermes has no complete native code, dependency, state migration, companion, and service rollback transaction.
The approved Skills companion diverges from an older base and is untested against the pinned current upstream target.
The ACP companion is untested against the pinned current upstream target.
The installed source checkout contains untracked local content that requires an explicit preserve, port, or abandon decision.
The current upstream target is unreleased main-branch code even though it reports the same 0.19.0 version as the installed checkout.
recommendation: Keep Cabinet preview-only and require upstream versioned discover, prepare, commit, status, and rollback contracts plus companion side-by-side qualification before enabling Apply.
